column1: # variantFeatures reference residues — committed slice for the wrong-gene guard.
# Source: variantFeatures repo, data/variants.db, table variant_consequences
#   SELECT DISTINCT gene_symbol, aa_pos, aa_ref FROM variant_consequences
#   WHERE gene_symbol=? AND aa_pos=? AND aa_ref IS NOT NULL
# (aa_ref is the reference amino acid at that protein position for the gene's
# canonical/MANE transcript). Baked in here so the negative-case test is
# self-contained and does not need the sibling variantFeatures DB present.
# This is the local equivalent of the UniProt reference-AA check: a variant
# "<ref><pos><alt>" assigned to <gene> is a wrong-gene call when <ref> != aa_ref.
